title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Codex Export Packet
description: Structured form of a tokenized Codex/agent work packet exported from a supervision session (the AI_OS-native translation of Base44 'Codex export packets'). A packet is a PROPOSAL. It is never auto-executed: it must satisfy the AGENTS.md identity/token rules and receive Human Owner approval before any worker applies it.

exec_token.description: AI_OS execution token marker for routing discipline, e.g. <<APPLY:AIOS-EAST-NS-IMPORT>>. Marks intent only; does not bypass safety.

worker_identity.description: Packet-scoped worker identity, e.g. EAST_OCC_01 / WEST_OCC_01.

approval_required.description: Always true. Validator PASS is evidence only and never authorizes APPLY/commit/push/merge.

safety_note.description: Restates blocked capabilities: no executor/autonomy, no hardware runtime, no real senders, no scheduler, no commit/push/merge, no secrets, no live trading.
